rationale: sample_summary 'Human_fetal_liver' and titles like 'A10A_fetalHep2_fetal17' indicate primary fetal hepatocyte references.
sample_summary 'liver bud' with titles 'lb1_A1' etc. matches iPSC-derived liver bud differentiation.
sample_summary 'Human_adult_liver' with titles like 'A12B_hep25_hHep' indicates primary adult human hepatocyte (hHep) references, not iPSC-derived cells.
sample_summary 'liver biopsy' from study of 'liver biopsies from HCV-infected patients' makes these HCV-infected liver tissue.
sample_summary 'Normal liver' with 'NT' suffix titles like 'P02_NT', 'P04_a_NT' indicates matched non-tumor liver from hepatoblastoma patients.
sample_summary 'Liver' with titles 'Liver_1'..'Liver_24' from healthy adult donors in a multi-tissue pharmacogene survey.
sample_summary 'Non-neoplastic liver tissue' with titles 'Non-neoplastic liver tissue of P105' etc. is matched non-tumor from HBV-HCC patients.
sample_summary 'Liver' with titles like '2429N | 2429T' mixes matched normal and HCC tumor samples within the group.
sample_summary 'iCCA patient, liver' with titles like 'ICC10 (RNA-seq)' indicates intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma tumor tissue.
sample_summary 'Human liver tissue' with titles 'CC1-Tissue', 'CHC1-Tissue' etc. are primary liver cancer tissue (mixed CC/HCC/CHC), defaulting to HCC as the dominant hepatocellular signal.
sample_summary 'Liver tissue of obese patient' with titles 'L_1008'..'L_1045' from morbidly obese bariatric surgery patients.

sample_summary 'Erythroblast differentiated from human fetal liver CD34+ hematopoietic stem cells' with titles 'Fetal_liver_erythroblast_rep*' indicates blood-lineage cells from fetal liver hematopoiesis.
sample_summary 'liver' with shRNA/PDGF-treated titles matches the study's primary human hepatic stellate cells.
sample_summary 'Unfixed Fresh Frozen Human Liver' with titles 'LM1-WL/Z1/Z2/Z3' are laser-microdissected zones from healthy donor livers.
sample_summary 'Human liver tumoroid' with titles 'CC1-Organoid_1', 'CHC1-Organoid_1' are patient-derived liver tumor organoids.
sample_summary 'Hepatoblastoma liver' with titles 'Sample_RNAseq_FT10'..'FT15' are hepatoblastoma tumors.
sample_summary 'normal liver' from a fibrolamellar HCC study indicates matched normal liver controls from those patients.
sample_summary 'liver, non-tumor' with titles like 'Highly differentiated P21N' (N=non-tumor) indicates matched adjacent non-tumor liver.
sample_summary 'liver, tumor' with titles 'Highly differentiated P21T' (T=tumor) indicates HCC tumor tissue.
sample_summary 'liver tumor' from 'Genome and transcriptome profiling of fibrolamellar carcinoma' indicates fibrolamellar HCC tumor tissue.
sample_summary 'liver_before_low_carbohydrate_diet' with subject titles indicates NAFLD patient liver biopsies pre-intervention.
sample_summary 'liver_after_low_carbohydrate_diet' with subject titles indicates NAFLD patient liver biopsies post-intervention.
sample titles 'Ctrl_iron', 'High_iron_heavy', 'Low_iron_medium' from a study explicitly titled 'Iron response of HepG2 cells' confirm HepG2 line.
sample_summary 'Human liver organoid' with titles 'Healthy1-Organoid_1' etc. are organoids from healthy liver tissue.
sample_summary 'Alagille syndrome_liver needle biopsy' with titles 'Liver_ALGS1'..'Liver_ALGS5' is Alagille cholestatic liver disease.
sample_summary 'control_liver needle biopsy' with titles 'Liver_Ctrl1'..'Liver_Ctrl_adult' are controls drawn from patients with other liver disorders in an Alagille study.
sample_summary 'Liver hepatic stellate cells' from a study comparing 'gene expression in hepatic stellate cells on hydrogels' confirms primary HSCs.
sample_summary 'Human normal liver from patient' with titles 'Sample_9128-N'..'9401-N' (N=normal) is matched normal liver from HCC patients.
sample titles 'PHH 0d | PHH 1d | PHH 2d | PHH 4d' are Primary Human Hepatocytes cultured over a time course as reference.
Sample summary states 'PDX cell line from a liver metastasis from a primary pancreas tumor', making it a non-liver primary metastasis that grew in liver.
Sample summary is 'Adult Liver' from a study of quadruplicate RNA-seq on human livers with no disease indication.
Sample summary is 'Child Liver' with no disease indication; pediatric but non-fetal normal liver tissue best fits normal adult liver category.
Sample summary 'Healthy liver leukocytes' and study describes 'NK cells sorted from perfusion fluid of healthy human livers'.
Sample summary 'Liver Metastasis Tumour' from 'primary breast cancer patients who developed liver metastasis'.
Sample summary 'Liver' described as 'normal liver' in the CaptureSeq tissue panel.
Sample summary 'Liver_normal_tissue biopsy' with titles 'Liver, normal, pool' from donor tissue.
Sample titles 'Human Adult Liver 1/2/3' from a normal adult human liver cross-species comparison.
Sample summary 'Adjacent liver tissue' with '_nt' titles from HCC patients, described as 'matched non-tumor adjacent liver'.
Sample summary 'Normal liver' with 'NC' (normal control) titles from a hepatoblastoma study, most consistent with matched non-tumor liver from cancer patients.
Sample summary 'Liverbud at 0 time' from '3D liver organoids from co-culture of iPSC and stromal progenitors'.
Sample summary 'Liver buds at day 6' from 3D liver organoid differentiation.
Sample summary 'Liver buds at day 4' from 3D liver organoid differentiation.
Sample summary 'Liver buds day 2' from 3D liver organoid differentiation.
Sample titles 'RNA-Seq_HUVEC_AdHIF1a' are umbilical vein endothelial cells with no liver involvement.
Sample titles 'RNA-Seq_HUVEC_AdHIF2a' are umbilical vein endothelial cells, not liver.
Sample summary 'normal primary liver cells' with titles 'NorHep.ctrl/treatment' described as 'primary liver cells, not the cell lines'.
Sample summary 'Liver' from a 'normal tissue panel for circRNA discovery'.
Sample titles 'human lv 1/2' from a 'cross-species tissue panel including normal human liver'.
Sample summary 'fetal liver' with titles 'Fetal_liver_RNA_seq' from '12-week embryonic liver tissue'.
Sample summary 'fetal hepatocytes isolated from fetal liver' used as primary fetal hepatocyte reference.
Sample summary 'Liver' described as 'liver tissue used in an RNA degradation methods study' with no disease indication.
Sample summary 'recurrent liver tumor' from 'recurrent fibrolamellar HCC tumors' (fibrolamellar is a HCC variant).
Sample summary 'fetal hepatocytes isolated from fetal liver' used as fetal hepatocyte reference.
Sample summary 'fetal liver' with titles 'Truseq Fetal Liver 17/18' used as fetal liver reference.
Sample summary 'Homo sapiens liver tissue male adult (18 years)' from ENCODE with no disease indication.
Sample summary 'hiPSC-derived liver progenitor cells' with titles 'iPS-LPC' generated from hiPSCs.
Sample summary 'hiPSC-derived liver model' with titles 'iPS-liver' from hiPSC-derived liver co-culture.
Sample titles 'Human RNAseq Liver Female1/Male1 Adult' from a cross-species dosage compensation study with no disease indication.
Sample is a 'PDX cell line from a liver metastasis from a primary pancreas tumor', so cancer cells are pancreatic but residing in liver.
Sample summary states 'normal liver tissue' with titles LIVER1/LIVER2, used as control for an organoid study.
Sample is plain 'liver' (human_liver.single) from a multi-tissue splicing reference study.
Sample is '17 week human fetal liver sorted for haematopoietic stem/progenitor cells' (FL_HSPC), i.e. blood progenitors, not liver parenchyma.
Sample is 'Normal human liver biopsy' (Normal_huLiver) used as baseline tissue, not isolated cultured hepatocytes.
Sample is 'Liver, adult, diseased' from a study of 'gallstone disease-associated genes' in liver from a chronic gallstones patient.
Sample title is 'Blood_Platelets_Chol-376' — blood platelets, not liver tissue, despite the cholangiocarcinoma context.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Chol-379' indicates blood platelets from a cholangiocarcinoma patient, not liver tissue.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Liver-366' indicates blood platelets from a liver cancer patient, not liver tissue itself.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Chol-341' is platelets from a cholangiocarcinoma patient, not liver tissue.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Chol-316' is platelets from a KRAS-mutant cholangiocarcinoma patient, not liver tissue.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Chol-292' is platelets from a cholangiocarcinoma patient, not liver tissue.
Sample title 'Blood_Platelets_Liver-297' is platelets from a liver cancer patient, not liver tissue.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue male adult (32 years)' total RNA-seq, healthy liver.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue female child (6 years)' postnatal liver, no disease noted.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue male adult (32 years)' total RNA-seq, healthy liver.
ENCODE 'right lobe of liver tissue female adult (53 years)' healthy liver.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue male fetal (22 weeks)' fetal liver tissue.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue female fetal (20 weeks)' fetal liver tissue.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue female child (4 years)' postnatal liver tissue.
ENCODE 'right lobe of liver tissue female adult (53 years)' healthy adult liver.
ENCODE 'Homo sapiens liver tissue female fetal (20 weeks)' small RNA-seq fetal liver.
Roadmap Epigenome 'Liver tissue; polyA-RNA-seq_STL011LI' reference liver sample.
Sample is 'Whole liver' (NHL = native human liver) used as the in vivo control in an organoid differentiation study.
ENCODE 'right lobe of liver tissue female adult (53 years)' small RNA-seq, healthy liver.
ENCODE 'right lobe of liver tissue female adult (53 years)' small RNA-seq, healthy liver.
Sample is 'fetal liver derived CD34+ cells' (CD34_chromRNA), hematopoietic progenitors not liver parenchyma.
Sample title 'MIHA EV' is the immortalized human liver MIHA cell line with empty vector.
